Home › South London › Richmond › The Petersham Restaurant

Modern British

The Petersham Restaurant

★ 4.4 (1,234 Google reviews)
$$$ 📍 Nightingale Lane, Richmond
🍽️

About The Petersham Restaurant

The Sunday lunch at The Petersham Restaurant, with its extraordinary views over the Thames, is one of the most civilised family occasions in South West London. The Victorian hotel setting is genuinely grand but the staff are warm and accommodating to families. Best for a special celebration with primary-age and older children who can appreciate the setting.

Kid-friendly features

🍽️
Kids menu ✅ Yes
🪑
Highchairs ✅ Yes
🌿
Outdoor space ✅ Yes
🎠
Soft play area ❌ No
🚿
Baby changing ✅ Yes
🛻
Buggy accessible ✅ Yes
🔊
Noise level Quiet
📅
Booking Yes
👶
Best for primary, all ages

#sunday lunch#thames views#victorian#hotel restaurant#special occasion
